---
title: "DEV_P022: Disambiguation Learning"
subtitle: "Reference to NSQL_P001"
author: "System"
date: "2025-01-09"
date-modified: "2025-01-09"
categories: [principle, development-methodology, learning, nsql]
---

## Overview

This principle is fully documented in the NSQL module.

**Primary Source**: `scripts/nsql/docs/principles/NSQL_P001_disambiguation_learning.md`

## Summary

消歧義一次就記錄成規則，類似注音輸入法的學習功能。

### Core Idea

```
第一次遇到歧義 → 詢問 → 用戶選擇 → 記錄為規則 → 下次直接套用
```

### Analogy

| 次數 | 輸入 | 系統行為 |
|------|------|----------|
| 第一次 | 打「ㄑㄧˊ」 | 問「騎」還是「其」→ 選「騎」 |
| 第二次 | 打「ㄑㄧˊ」 | 直接顯示「騎」 |

## Implementation

See NSQL_P001 for full implementation details.

### Key Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `scripts/nsql/dictionary.yaml` | Base definitions with options |
| `scripts/nsql/learned_preferences.yaml` | Learned user preferences |
| `scripts/nsql/docs/principles/NSQL_P001_disambiguation_learning.md` | Full principle specification |

## Related Principles

- **NSQL_P001**: Primary source (in NSQL module)
- **NSQL Protocol v3.0**: Dynamic confirmation loop
